programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Jack Russell terriers, Ruby and Jinx, show how dogs communicate through energy and body language.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter rushes into Skeldale on his day off to try and save Richard Bell's lamb, who was badly injured when he was born just a few hours ago. And at Suzanne Benson's trekking centre, Julian's treating a very poorly one-week old llama called Noah.

programme.title: 6 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: The owners have made it through the first trying months, but now adolescence hits. For many puppy owners, this is the most trying time of all, with common problems including aggression, humping, and roaming; half of all dogs are abandoned at this stage.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets the Montgomery family, who are looking for a puppy that will grow up with their young daughter, Grace. They visit Alaskan Malamutes, Leonburgers and Bernese Mountain Dogs. Each family member has a favourite, which makes choosi …

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, farmer Richard Todd brings one of his much-loved semi-feral moggies into the practice. But ‘Pretty Tom’ isn’t living up to his name. Peter believes the lump on Tom’s face could be a life-threatening tumour.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In Birkenhead, Inspector Anthony Joynes is accompanied by the police to attend an unlocked and empty property. Inside he finds Teddy, the terrified Terrier cross that has a flea infestation so bad that he's missing half his fur.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales
programme.desc: Future zoologists learn to care for big cats at a zoo school.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Sebastian the red-nose dog-deer; cat with wig on; dog walks with booties on feet.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: At Jackie Barlow's farm, Mako the alpaca has a lump on his face that's the size of half a football! And Mako is louder than a football crowd, with Julian admitting he's one of his noisiest patients ever.

programme.title: Dog School
programme.desc: At Dog’s Country Club in Warrington a potential new pupil is arriving, Minnie the Rottweiler. Before she can be offered a place, she needs to have her behaviour assessed.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter battles to deliver lambs who are jumbled up and stuck inside their mum, and he is shocked by what he finds. Julian has to contend with an angry parrot that has escaped in the surgery. A rescue dog is attacked by another dog.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.desc: Sable persuades Heath not to kill her. Upset by her close encounter with death, she goes to Dex for comfort; Alexis goes to Paris to keep an eye on Boyd's commando operation to retrieve her oil tankers.

programme.desc: Alexis gets her revenge on Sable when she tells her tankers have sunk; Alexis is devastated when she discovers Dex slept with Sable; as Sammy Jo becomes increasingly fond of Tanner McBride, she is unaware that he is married.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.desc: Hosted by Emmanuel Acho, LeSean McCoy, James Jones, and Chase Daniel, The Facility takes you inside the biggest sports topics from the athlete’s perspective.

programme.desc: Contestant will be locked to a net that is dangling from the cargo load ramp of a Sikorsky helicopter over the water. Contestants must make their way through a maze. Contestants must climb into the back of a car that is slowly filling with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant is placed in a coffin, lowered into a grave, and their partner must free them. The contestants will be placed into a 7-foot deep Plexiglas tank divided into two sections and filled with water.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Team of two contestants will be in a four-walled roof-less office- type room that is filled with desks, chairs, filing cabinets, etc. Contestants will be bound in straight jackets and will have amount of time to escape.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants will be driving a boat down a path while connected to a helicopter. Contestants will be on their knees inside a plexiglas tank. Contestants will be standing in a plexi box that is suspended over water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each couple is standing on the edge of the roof. Contestant will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants are driving behind a flatbed and their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on a building ledge as a wind and rain storm inhibits their movement. Contestants must bob their heads into a container to retrieve cockroaches with their mouths. Couples will be on their stomachs on a flash flood set.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A crane will be driving alongside the edge of a berth with its boom arm extended out over the berth. Contestants will start this stunt by jumping into garbage, retrieving items. 2 contestants will hold onto ski lines connected to the helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Rocky Mountain Hauntings
programme.desc: This week TAPS answers the Wrights begging call heads to Manitou Springs, Colorado to investigate the Briarhurst Manor located at the base of Pike's Peak.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called to wrangle some ghosts that seem to be haunting the resting place of Buffalo Bill.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: New Hampshire Gothic
programme.desc: The TAPS team heads to New Hampshire to help a group of volunteers figure out what is causing the lively paranormal activity in their otherwise quiet museum.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pensacola Lighthouse
programme.desc: TAPS heads to the Florida Panhandle to investigate a notoriously haunted lighthouse with over a century's worth of paranormal reports.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget (Classic)
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget foils Dr. Claw's plans to destroy him while on a vacation at a health spa.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget is everyone's favorite bionic policeman. Aided by his niece, Penny and his faithful dog, Brain, Inspector Gadget is out to save Santa Claus and Christmas from the evil clutches of Dr. Claw and his mindless followers.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget's Last Case
programme.desc: Gadget is forced to say goodbye to his beloved but aging Gadgetmobile and accept a newer, younger replacement vehicle. Meanwhile Gadget's archenemy Dr. Claw uses a competing crime fighter to discredit Gadget and cost him his badge.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Green-eyed Monster
programme.desc: A new girl arrives at school and quickly catches Archie's attention.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: An alien invasion turns Riverdale teenagers into zoned out couch potatoes, while sentient space potatoes mutate to replace them as vegetable zombies.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Archie's Date with Fate
programme.desc: When a thief steals a time travel device from Dilton's lab, Archie finds himself trapped in a time loop where he relives the same horrible day over and over again, always ending with the same disastrous date with Veronica.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Betty begins to mysteriously receive fortune cookies that instruct her to carry out simple good deeds each of which leads to a reward.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Day the Earth Moved
programme.desc: Giant, toothy-mawed worms the size of freight trains are plowing beneath the grounds of an old section of Riverdale, eating cars, buildings and anything they can detect moving on the surface.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Spooky and mysterious things are happening at Riverdale High.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Dance of the Killer Bees
programme.desc: Humanoid bee creatures begin causing trouble for the people of Riverdale after their leader, the Queen Bee, decides to make the attic of Riverdale High her new hive.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: In an effort to catch both Veronica and Betty's attention, Reggie attempts to steal some of Dilton's physique enhancing solution.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: The Incredible Shrinking Teens
programme.desc: Archie and Jughead accidentally shrink themselves in a shrink machine at a local Mad Scientist convention.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries
programme.desc: Dr. Arachnid, an evil supervillain, has come to Riverdale to commit some dastardly deeds.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Extra Terror-Estrial
programme.desc: Betty and the rest of the gang rescue Gleebo, a cute little alien who has crash-landed in Riverdale while trying to escape from two ugly aliens.

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries: Little Chock'lit Shoppe Of Horrors
programme.desc: In an attempt to make Pop's Chock'lit Shoppe more efficient, Dilton installs some high-tech labor-saving devices which ultimately conflict with Pop's personal attention policy.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Diving in minisubs off the coast of North Carolina with famed treasure hunter Bill Robinson, the BION team digs up a shield belonging to the ancient order of the Knights of the Crusades.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip, Cyril, and Sam travel to Cairo, Egypt to investigate the case of a woman put in a coma by the Curse of King Tut, after trying to buy contraband artifacts from the dead Pharaoh's tomb.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When a lucky coin is stolen from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, it triggers a market crash, threatening even the vast wealth of the Ripley fortune.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When Rip's former girlfriend, Dr. Anderson, steals an Egyptian sarcophagus, hoping to clone an Egyptian Princess inside, the team must fly to Iceland to get it back.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip & Co. wing to Japan to investigate reports of a live Oni, the Japanese Demon. They discover that the Oni report is a cover-up for something even more fantastic: the discovery of the magical Daruma Dolls.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Cyril inherits an Irish castle, where water from the Well of Doon is said to cure all ailments. To preserve the well for the inhabitants of the city, Cyril has to fight against an inheritance claim of rich businessman, Ron Blackard.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: A vacation in Australia starts on the wrong foot when Rip's wallet is stolen, and left at the sight of a stolen Tjuringa Stone, a sacred aboriginal artifact believed to control peoples dreams.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When the Golden Helmet of Ur is stolen from the BION HQ, Rip, Cyril, and Sam follow its tracking device to Kuwait City, in the Middle East.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: Rip finds in his uncle's diary details of a failed trip to Tibet, searching evidence of the Yeti.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When Cyril insists on being included in a strenuous weekend hike deep into the bush of Northern Quebec, using only Samuel de Champlain's Astrolabe to guide them, he ends up being chased by a ravenously hungry bear and getting lost.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: A trip to New Orleans to purchase The Evil Eye, a rare voodoo artifact, results in the Voodoo Museum's curator being turned into a zombie by a High Priestess who attempts to prevent the sale from going through.

programme.title: Ripley's Believe It or Not!
programme.desc: When the two daughters of an old friend of Cyril's receive Turkish Love Charms, they are mysteriously swept away by Whirling Dervishes.

programme.title: Sonic y su banda

programme.title: Sonic y su banda

programme.title: Sonic y su banda

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Millie trae a casa un gato extraño y sin pelo, y Coop descubre que su vida, que era feliz, nunca volverá a ser la misma. Coop desafía a su papá cuando se queda despierto viendo una película de terror y descubre que su casa fue invadida por gatos zombis.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: La Sra. Munson dicta la ley: Coop no debe poner un pie en su patio. Sr. Gato termina con un collar hecho para controlar sus exigentes maullidos.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los dos finalistas, con la ayuda de los chefs eliminados, compiten en una simulación que pone a prueba sus habilidades para administrar un restaurante.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: Mapas de Asesinatos: Los asesinatos de Shepherd's Bush
programme.desc: Tres agentes de policía fueron asesinados en Shepherds Bush el viernes 12 de agosto de 1966 por Harry Roberts.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Easter Sunday: Jersey Shore style. Lola the Bunny returns, Angelina and Snooki wreak havoc at a winery, and the roommates enjoy an old-fashioned night out on the boardwalk.The only thing standing in the way of a good time is the beef between Mike & Deena.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dren (n): Snooki's alter ego. Pauly and Nikki arrive, and the roommates meet the local wildlife. But the lions and tigers and bears got nothing on Snooki when Dren takes over on Nikki's birthday.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dren continues her attack on San Diego. Something is going on between Angelina and Vinny. And, when the roommates take a trip to San Diego's Little Italy, they're surprised to find the ultimate Guido waiting for them - Uncle Nino.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Deena's "Family Fun Day" has Angelina struggling in the wake of her failed marriage. Jenni lands in the emergency room. And Nick Cannon and Justina Valentine lead the squad in an impromptu game of "Wild 'N Out." May the funniest guido win!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Water turns into wine and in the blink of an eye, it's pure chaos between Pauly, Nikki, and Angelina.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Deena is still wondering if last night's showdown was all a prank, while the rest of the roomies are wondering, "Where do we go from here?" Meanwhile, Vinny plans a day in his honor.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny throws an epic party on the last night of the family vacation, filled with carbs, strip clubs and a late night rendezvous no one saw coming. See ya, San Diego!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: TV's greatest Italian family returns to the reunion stage and they're not holding back... is Angeliners finally divorced? Is old Sitch gone forever? Tacos and dramers are on the menu in Part 1 of the Jersey Shore Family Vacation reunion!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Your favorite roommates aren't done yet! Vinny and Angelina get spicy, the Meatballs embrace their wild side, and tensions get so hot one roommate leaves to cool off. The party continues tonight with Part 2 of the Jersey Shore reunion!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The roommates rally around Mike as he says goodbye to his beloved dog, Mosey. Deena's on edge because Angelina's been hanging out with her brother-in-law. And the fam gets a big surprise when they hit the Shore for DJ Pauly D's gig at Headliners.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki turns Deena, Angelina and JWoww into a cheer squad. Mike channels Rocky as he trains for the Super Hole 3 Corn Hole Championships, but Angelina inadvertently jeopardizes his chance for the win. And the fam heads south for the big event.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Just an ordinary day at the lake, filled with boating, drinking, fighting, lap dancing...and a revelation that leaves the roomies speechless.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: What's next for Angelina after revealing her true feelings for Vinny? And, in the words of Pauly D, a game of truth or dare gets "Awkward." Plus, the cornhole finals are here and The Situation is ready for Jay Cutler.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Mike wants to win it all, Prickly Elder wants to go to bed, Snooki wants to start a fire, and Angelina wants Vinny. But what does Vinny want?

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: David is suing William after testifying for him in criminal court, and wants to be paid the wages he's owed.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Jane claims her ex-husband of 25 years owes her over $3,000 for their son's wedding.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Delores says her twin sister agreed to split her medical bills when she became ill while planning her party.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: McKenzie is suing her baby's father for the price of a car because he chooses work and football over the family.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Ashley is suing her former friend, Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Taneya is done with this relationship. She says Taylor won't "man up" and be a provider for their family.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Anita says Ronald is a chronic cheater and a sex addict. He demands sex constantly and when doesn’t get his way, he admits he feels forced to seek sex outside the marriage. Can Judge Toler save this couple?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Matthew is sick of his overbearing military wife controlling his every move. Rebekah says her husband needs structure but Matthew doesn't want a drill sergeant as a wife.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Sity says she should've known her marriage wasn't going to work when John showed up an hour and half late to their wedding. John says their marriage feels more like an agreement rather than love.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Over 17 years of marriage Leon has had countless affairs with other women and Siobhan has had it. She claims all he wants is for her to keep his house clean and pick up after him. Leon argues that the problems stem from Siobhan’s bad drinking habits.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Dante admits he cheated on Theresa several times during their marriage because Theresa wouldn't touch him! Theresa says Dante is a liar and a cheater and she is done! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help them come to an agreement?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Maryetta lied to Tyrone about the paternity of their baby. Tyrone says he cannot take the lies any longer and he wants a divorce. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help Tyrone escape Maryetta's web of lies?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Rodney and Laura have dealt with difficulties due to alcohol abuse on both sides of their families. Now, Laura is worried Rodney may be following in his relatives' footsteps.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Susan says Jaime is a player who can't stay away from other women. Jaime says when you fall in love with someone you will do whatever it takes to be with them. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help this couple end things amicably?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Dashia says William is a cheater and spends most of his money on alcohol instead of paying the bills. William says Dashia is sneaky, belittles him, has trust issues and allows her family to interfere in their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Barbara says Alicia is a cheater and a thief. Barbara's seen Alicia’s text messages from men and asserts she is verbally abusive and financially irresponsible. Alicia says Barbara is controlling, a liar, selfish and never committed to their marriage.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Rhonda says Charles ruined their dream wedding and she wants her money back. Charles says she knew he didn't have a job when she agreed to marry him. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam help get Rhonda the money she lost?

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Kentra is here for a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Lynn believes his wife was cheating on him throughout their relationship, now he's here to be paid back for a loan.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: The Shaq Paq helps Gronk get ready for the big debut with his daredevil hero, Cuckoo Carlos / An underwater treasure hunt quickly turns into a rescue operation.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot! Toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened! / A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. The Joe team uses an energy mirror array to counter Cobra's Weather Dominator attack on Washington, D.C. When their defense is successful, the Weather Dominator explodes in orbit, scattering its vital components across the globe.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. The Joe team is preparing to trek across the globe to the Island of no return to retrieve one of the three fragments of the weather dominator before Destro and Cobra can get their hands on it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. As the Island of no return battle rages on, Spirit goes one-on-one with Storm Shadow for the second weather dominator fragment. Meanwhile, in the freezing arctic battleground, both sides fight for the final fragment of the weather dominator.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: It’s the final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights’ Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, ALEX, and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY gets to join them, but her father doesn’t want her to graduate.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: When Jestro awakens, he’s been blasted miles and miles away from the King’s Castle by Merlok’s explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. It seems the Book of Monsters broke Jestro’ fall.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn’t listen.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It’s pretty scary. But he feeds it to the Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, and the monster that can induce fear.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: It’s movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about the remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl’s hometown of DIGGINTON (where they realize that all of Axl’s family look just like him.) While they’re there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books!

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they’re booed and pelted with food.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, while still attacking the King’s Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he’s found (and has been saving.) It’s the powerful “Book of Revenge!”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: As the Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they’re always getting over on him.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro’s not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure,” says the Book of Monsters so they’ve got to go out looting!

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: A Dilophosaurus runs loose in the park's hotel, and Owen and Claire must find it before the guests notice ... and before Vic's dino-hunting security team can damage the hotel and the guests!

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1

programme.title: World Series Films

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jaycee shows Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat and ruin a family. Casi feels her fiancé could learn a lesson from past guest Kevin. Plus, we set viewer Tamara and guest Nathan up on a date.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Gail needs more excitement in her life so she's been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back, even wear her bra!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shawn proposed to Nicole after she said she was carrying his baby but refused to show him any proof and then claimed a miscarriage. Next, Kamesha believed Derrick was the one but began to doubt his fidelity. Will these couples make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After Cassarah became Tim's live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers' parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job has caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating. Later, Jim denies serious allegations with his fiancee's sister and other young girls.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nicky and Carissa have been on and off for 8-years, and Donald thinks she's still seeing Nicky. Then Chastity suffered a miscarriage and discovered Sean cheated, but now he says she's cheating with his relatives!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kevis suspects Ashley of cheating, while she accuses him of infidelity. With a lie detector test, Steve aims to uncover the truth and shock them both. Secrets will be revealed, challenging their perceptions and relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle's boyfriend Ashley is too close to Tenielle's daughter! Latoya and the child's father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off-limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Carla ha estado siendo infiel a su novio con su mejor amigo y su hermana! Después, Yvonne le contará a su amiga Marie que ha tenido relaciones sexuales con su novio. Mary Sue y su amante secreto, Cory, han venido a confrontar al novio de Mary Sue, Scott.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Jamie le ha sido infiel a su novio con una mujer! Después, Steve cree que su esposa ha sido infiel con otro hombre. A continuación, LaToya viene a causar un conflicto familiar. ¡Ella ha estado siendo infiel con la hermana de su novia!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana abofetea a Natalia como una advertencia de que no le diga a Ricky que él no es el hijo de Ernesto. Natalia la amenaza con que muy pronto ella se irá con Ricky.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura es interrogada por el Comisario, quien de inmediato se da cuenta que ella está mintiendo al ver la forma en la que se contradice en sus declaraciones.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana va a la casa de Octavia para reclamarle por todos sus actos contra su familia. Octavia y Bruna intentan humillarla, pero se llevan una sorpresa ante la nueva actitud de Diana.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana toma el puesto de su madre temporalmente en la fábrica y es bienvenida por sus trabajadores con un mensaje que la deja desconcertada.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le agradece nuevamente a Camila todas las atenciones que tiene para con él, pero ella aprovecha para besarlo y pedirle que se quede con ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva se besan y hablan de su hijo. Maximiliano le dice a Rosaura que el la ama y quiere casarse con ella, que él es libre, no como Luis Mario, quien está casado y no podrá hacerla su esposa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario besa a Rosaura y luego la deja, empujándola y llamándola engreída y minina. Fernando le cuenta a Bruno todo lo que pasó. Bruno le dice que esa es su casa y ellos su familia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le reclama a Patricio lo de Karina y él le da un puño, tirándolo al suelo. Minerva lo llama cobarde y Iván también lo llama cobarde. Camelia se ríe y se va. Ni Eduarda ni Jimena quieren comer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda se desespera en el momento en que se entera que Rosaura y Patricio se van a casar, razón por la cual va al estudio en busca de un revolver para matar Rosaura o al Patricio.

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A loving husband and father of two, Jim Russo, is kidnapped after accidentally getting involved in illegal dealings far beyond what he imagined.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a Wall Street investor is murdered, the team is led to an insider-trading ring that uses unconventional methods to gain information.

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Daisy Thorpe goes missing in a small upstate New York town that remains shaken by the unsolved murder of the cleric's 13-year-old daughter, Amber, seven years ago.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As Vivian undergoes open-heart surgery, Jack and the team search for a missing woman who may be the innocent victim of an identity theft ring.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, a half-bright loser stranded in Reno, is down to his last few bucks when Sydney, taking pity on him, buys him breakfast and offers him a few tips on making money in the casinos. Two years later, John has become Sydney's partner.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: For three showgirls it was the dream of a lifetime, a four week cabaret engagement in Alice Springs. The problem is simply getting there intact, along with their bus Priscilla. It's not easy being a drag queen in the outback!

programme.title: Ali

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine's youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: The Last Airbender

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to The River Rock Inn in Milford Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is over his head and drowning in debt. Unable to get any guests to stay in his neglected inn, Ken has all but given up.

programme.title: Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon visits Coeur D'Alene, Idaho, to try to rescue the failing Roosevelt Inn. Despite being over a million dollars in debt, the Roosevelt's owner, John Hough, is more interested in telling jokes than he is in fixing his struggling B&B.

programme.title: Hotel Hell

programme.desc: Paul and his American bride Alissa were after the sort of space you only really get Stateside, while Malcolm and Jenny wanted to be wrapped up tight in a warm embrace?. But did either couple get what they wanted in the end?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil in Manchester as they hunt out two very different first homes for two young buyers new to the market. Neither buyer will be living in their new home alone, and both of them are promising to share the decision-making fifty-fifty.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Camp Crystal Lake has been shuttered for over 20 years due to several vicious and unsolved murders. The camp's new owner and seven young counselors are readying the property for re-opening despite warnings of a "death curse" by local residents.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part II
programme.desc: Five years after the bloodbath at Camp Crystal, all that remains is the legend of Jason and his demented mother, who had murdered seven camp counselors. At a nearby summer camp, the new counselors are unconcerned about the warnings to stay away.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III
programme.desc: Ignoring Camp Crystal Lake’s bloody legacy, one by one they fall victim to the maniacal Jason who stalks them at every turn...

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part - IV: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: After his revival in a hospital morgue, the hockey-masked murderer fixes his vengeful attention on the Jarvis family and a group of hitherto carefree teenagers.

programme.desc: While visiting Seijuro and Natsumi's apartment, Usagi and Mamoru come under attack by the Makai Tree.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa leaves the house after being scolded by Usagi. Chibi-Usa begins to cry, which draws the attention of Rubeus and the Four Spectre Sisters.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru has a dream which a voice warns him that being with Usagi will bring her great misfortune. Meanwhile, Sailor Moon is attacked by a Droid.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Día de la boda choque de coche. Gigante enloquecido en una camilla. Familia de monóxido de carbono. Cuchillo en la espalda.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de urgencias herido organiza un espectáculo para detener los arrebatos violentos de un paciente; el corazón de un hombre falla cuando su hija y su novia pelean; en Nochebuena, la familia y el médico de una víctima de quemaduras oran por milagros

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer embarazada recibe un disparo en el abdomen, pero se niega a someterse a pruebas y tratamientos, poniendo en peligro su vida y la del bebé; una doctora es víctima de un robo de auto y cree que su paciente puede ser el culpable.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos realizan una incisión en el pecho mientras esperan a los cirujanos; Se introduce una iguana después de un accidente automovilístico.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El cráneo de un hombre es atravesado con una palanca; la tos de una mujer resulta ser una infección por gusanos internos; una novia está cosida en su vestido de novia y se niega a quitárselo, aunque necesita tratamiento para un cálculo renal.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre adulto grita sin cesar sin razón, una madre joven está alerta pero helada, y un niño parece tener una sobredosis de drogas, pero lo niega.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pila de paneles de yeso se derrumba sobre un niño de 12 años. Cuando una mujer griega se queja de dolor abdominal, la Dra. Angelique Campen está decidida a descubrir la causa, a pesar de que otros médicos no han encontrado nada.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de urgencias emborracha a su paciente para salvarle la vida; los médicos se preocupan cuando un paciente se queda rígido tras una caída y otro es electrocutado por la policía; un niño es empalado en el cuello por un cohete de botella.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La vida después de la muerte. Dos documentos, un ataque al corazón. Sobredosis de analgésicos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente es llevado a la sala de emergencias después de recibir un disparo en el muslo. Los médicos no pueden encontrar la bala y están preocupados cuando el paciente tiene dolores en el pecho.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un señuelo de pesca incrustado en la cara de un hombre resulta ser el menor de sus problemas; un par de adolescentes enlodados inconscientes son llevados a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Mamá abofetea a la víctima de un accidente automovilístico. Hacha en la cabeza. Piloto adicto a las drogas.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: La tía Joan se ve obligada a recibir tratamiento de Martin después de casi atropellar a alguien. Alison Lane se acerca al Dr., quien se preocupa por el comportamiento de su hija Delph.

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba no puede hacer nada contra la bajera Mundo Toon de Pegasus y el poder de su ojo del milenio, siendo humillado y derrotado en el duelo. Al ganar, Pegasus atrapa el alma de Kaiba en una carta, igual como Mokubah y el abuelo de Yugi.

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi está resuelto a vencer a Pegasus para salvar a su abuelo. Tea, Tristán y Bakura buscan en el castillo de Pegasus una explicación para sus poderes.

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi se desconcentra por la mirada de el Ojo Milenio de Pegasus, y deja que Mai coja una ventaja enorme con su Dragón Mascota de Arpía. ¿Podrá Yugi enfocarse a tiempo, o dejará que la mirada de Pegasus le cueste el duelo?

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Después de perderle a Joey, Mai se ha convertido en un duelista mucho mejor. Pero no es cierto si Yugi ha aprendido de su perdida contra Kaiba, o si la emoción de su perdida le están pesando al corazón. ¡La respuesta esta en las tarjetas!

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey busca la carta que lo permitirá entrar en la batalla final sin saber que el Bandido Keith se la robó. Mientras él está pensando que Serenity se quedará ciega para siempre, ¡recibe ayuda de un amigo nuevo!

programme.title: ¡Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Doug gets 'checked out' by a waitress at Cooper's he suddenly feels very dapper. He begins to change his image a bit and Carrie finds the whole thing amusing. That is, until she checks out the waitress herself and sees that she is quite a dish.

programme.desc: The bowling team, which features Doug, Richie, Spence, Deacon and Carrie, is in jeopardy of losing their sponsorship from Cooper’s if they don’t win their next game.

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur is moved upstairs to Carrie's office once the weather gets cold, but have problems when the weather moves up and Arthur thinks his move was permanent.

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.desc: Andi hires a pretty, young babysitter, Sophia (Victoria Justice), to watch the kids, and gets jealous when her daughter, Kate, goes to her instead for advice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam discovers that the pastor he hired for their wedding was a phony and he and Andi aren't really married, he scrambles to find a way to fix it before she finds out.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: To try to show his care and interest in their relationship, Jeff sends Audrey on a scavenger hunt. Russell thinks Jennifer has a sex tape and enlists Timmy's help in finding it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey believes her maid needs an operation to correct the limp she has to be able to walk better, thinking she is doing the right thing Audrey asks her neighbors to contribute to the cause not having any idea what the money is really intended for.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Frustrated by his boss blaming him for burning his mouth on hot soup, Timmy has a special spoon created for Russell. Audrey's plan backfires when she tries to seduce Jeff in the bedroom in order to get him to complete household tasks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Timmy wants to reconnect with a woman he met on the subway; Jeff and Audrey turn on each other when former friends snub them.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey drags Jen to a Bon Jovi concert to prove that she's still young and fun, leaving Jeff and Adam at home. Russell finds a phone number in his pocket and asks Timmy to investigate.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey tries to prepare for motherhood by continuing to repair a doll that she keeps damaging. Meanwhile, Jeff questions whether the very pregnant Brenda should be dating anymore, and Adam tries to convince Jennifer that he is a manly man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jen puts the wrong date on the invitations to Audrey's baby shower, Jeff likes Audrey's maternity clothes, and Russell gives up women.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey discover surprising news about their surrogate.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Jeff screws up paying for Audrey's Pilates classes, he reveals to Adam that he has a 'Bank' of mistakes that she has incurred that he uses to ease her anger. Russell sends an email to Timmy's crush.

programme.desc: Eggman turns Amy, Sticks, Tails, and Knuckles into evil clones of himself. / Sonic and Tails save a village that's being plundered by bandits — and then find that they can't leave because the villagers guilt trips them into staying.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When a sentient computer virus takes over all of Dr. Eggman's technology, Orbot and Cubot must enter the cyber world to defeat it. / Dr. Eggman hires an intern who turns out to be a bit unstable.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Dr. Eggman discovers that “Modern Lair” Magazine wants to do a spread on his evil lair, he enlists Amy to help spruce up the place. / Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles accidentally awaken a sleeping rock giant, who begins rampaging.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After seeing a cross-eyed moose, Sticks is convinced that she and her friends are cursed. / When Dr. Eggman loses his confidence, he enlists the aid of Soar the Eagle, a motivational speaker and life coach.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Every time Sonic runs, his speed causes a deafening tone, so he's forced to give up his speed until a solution can be found. / Tails reprograms one of Eggman's robots and accidentally turns it into a killing machine.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: When Scaredy's ears get blocked with water, it costs him his job. Then, Sally becomes Scaredy's personal helper trout, after he saves her life.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: The store is getting too fancy and Scaredy wants things back to normal. Then, Scaredy gets tricked into signing up for the Mr. Perfect Balsa Competition.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy must fight for his job after Paddy begins working at the Stash N' Hoard. Then, a new toy becomes a craze in Balsa and Scaredy is desperate to be included.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy promises Dave that he will ride a rollercoster at the fair. Then, Scaredy investigates why they stopped making his favorite snack.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy loses an acorn that completes his collection. Then, Scaredy meets his stacking hero and tries to help him regain his greatness.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy has to spend the night guarding the store and comes face to face with a burglar. Then, Scaredy tries to spend more time with his first crush.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy rids a holiday of commercialization. Then, Scaredy's suggestion box proves to be a bad suggestion that he shouldn't have suggested.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci turns 25, Farrah deals with a challenging employee, Tyler celebrates Butch's important anniversary, and Matt's troubled son arrives as Amber tries to clear up nasty rumors.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Matt lay down strict rules for their houseguest, Farrah prepares her newest business, Maci enjoys her bridal shower, and Catelynn and Tyler's anniversary is marred by tough news.

programme.desc: Maci and Taylor party in Las Vegas, Catelynn explores equine therapy, Amber and Matt meet with a writer to set the record straight, and Farrah's conflict with Debra hits a boiling point.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber undergoes plastic surgery in an attempt to relieve her negative self-image issues, while Farrah and her mum try to reconcile their differences after an awkward encounter.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah is wary of Debra as she opens her third store, Tyler reflects on his emotional state, Maci celebrates Halloween with her extended family, and Amber is hurt by Gary's lack of trust.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Bentley celebrates his eighth birthday with family, Farrah hires a nanny, Amber and Gary try to find common ground, and Tyler and Catelynn wonder how best to support Butch after his relapse.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Catelynn celebrate their daughters' birthdays as Tyler dreams of a son, Farrah decides to bid farewell to Texas, and Ryan is angered by Maci's Thanksgiving plans for Bentley.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah tours San Diego with Simon's help, Catelynn and Tyler escape on a wintry weekend getaway, Amber feels left out of Leah's Christmas plans, and Ryan has a big surprise for Mackenzie.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber plans a fashion show, Maci has a heart-to-heart with Mackenzie, Farrah and Debra reunite for Sophia's birthday, and Tyler and Catelynn resolve to learn from their parents' mistakes.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Butch seeks Dr. Drew's advice, Amber has doubts about her engagement to Matt, Mackenzie goes behind Maci's back with Ryan's parents, and Sophia meets Debra's fiance at an awkward dinner.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler come up with a new business idea, Farrah undergoes hypnotherapy, a trip to Las Vegas causes major strife for Amber and Matt, and Maci receives disturbing news about Ryan.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn looks for ways to help out other young moms in need, Farrah appears on a dating show, Amber is taken aback by Gary's big surprise, and Maci and Taylor try out marriage counseling.
